changesProposed.name: Future Ventures

verified.name: Future Ventures
verified.thesis: Future Ventures focuses on seed and early-stage investments in trailblazing, purpose-driven entrepreneurs with unique ideas that have the potential to reinvent entire industries.
verified.notes: Founded year cannot be verified from sources; database entry states 2018 but sources indicate 'for the past 25 years' of backing founders (as of source publication date). AUM of $500M, flagship fund name, and HQ location cannot be verified from provided sources. Sector focus cannot be verified as explicit firm-wide list; individual partner bios mention specific sector interests but not formalized firm-level focus areas.

changes.current: Future Ventures focuses on seed and early-stage investments in trailblazing, purpose-driven entrepreneurs with unique ideas that have the potential to reinvent entire industries. The firm backs visionaries at the cutting edge of disruptive technology and new industry formation.
